name: My Lovely Bodyguard
original_name: หัวใจรักพิทักษ์เธอ
overview: Saraphi, a jobless stuntwoman, accidentally becomes the bodyguard of Thewan and his niece due to her incredible martial arts skills. As Saraphi and Thewan learn to work together to protect his niece from those out to get her fortune, who will protect them from falling for each other?

trailers.title: [Trailer] ละคร หัวใจรักพิทักษ์เธอ | one31
